satisfiesCircularReference.ts(2,7): error TS7023: 'f' implicitly has return type 'any' because it does not have a return type annotation and is referenced directly or indirectly in one of its return expressions.
satisfiesCircularReference.ts(2,20): error TS1360: Type 'number' does not satisfy the expected type '() => any'.


==== satisfiesCircularReference.ts (2 errors) ====
    // Circular reference after satisfies should produce errors, not panic
    const f = () => 42 satisfies typeof f
          ~
!!! error TS7023: 'f' implicitly has return type 'any' because it does not have a return type annotation and is referenced directly or indirectly in one of its return expressions.
                       ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1360: Type 'number' does not satisfy the expected type '() => any'.
    
    // These cases should work without errors
    const g = () => g satisfies typeof g
